sentences.english: My older brother and I fought all the time growing up.
Now we are really close though.
I'm the middle child, and I always felt invisible between my older and younger sister.
sentences.korean: 셋째인데 언니와 여동생 사이에서 항상 존재감이 없었어요.

sentences.english: I'm an only child, so I never experienced sibling rivalry, but I always wished I had a brother or sister.
sentences.korean: 외동이라 형제 경쟁을 경험하지 못했지만 항상 형제자매가 있으면 좋겠다고 생각했어요.
